blended.narrative: Bretton Woods is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 444 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.9" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
